items.title: Hunting Request #1
items.description: Starting Location: Valentine Post Office (Check the posters) Required Animals: 1 x Perfect Squirrel Carcass 1 x Perfect Rabbit Carcass Recommended Weapon: Small game arrows or Varmint Rifle Reward: $50

items.title: Hunting Request #2
items.description: Starting Location: Strawberry Post Office (Check the posters) Required Animals: 1 x Perfect Cardinal Carcass 1 x Perfect Rat Carcass 1 x Perfect Woodpecker Carcass Recommended Weapon: Small game arrows or Varmint Rifle Reward: $70

items.title: Hunting Request #3
items.description: Starting Location: Rhodes Post Office (Check the posters) Required Animals: 1 x Perfect Chipmunk Carcass 1 x Perfect Opossum Carcass 1 x Perfect Oriole Carcass 1 x Perfect Robin Carcass Recommended Weapon: Small game arrows or Varmint Rifle Reward: $120

items.title: Hunting Request #4
items.description: Starting Location: Saint Denis Post Office (Check the posters) Required Animals: 1 x Perfect Songbird Carcass 1 x Perfect Sparrow Carcass 1 x Perfect Toad Carcass 1 x Perfect Skunk Carcass 1 x Perfect Bullfrog Carcass Recommended Weapon: Small game arrows or Varmint Rifle Reward: $120

items.title: Hunting Request #5
items.description: Starting Location: Van Horn Post Office (Check the posters) - Available from Epilogue 1 Required Animals: 1 x Perfect Cedar Waxwing Carcass 1 x Perfect Bat Carcass 1 x Perfect Blue Jay Carcass 1 x Perfect Crow Carcass 1 x Perfect Beaver Carcass Recommended Weapon: Small game arrows or Varmint Rifle / Standard arrows or Repeater Rifle (Beaver) Reward: $150 and an invite to meet Ms. Hobbs, who will give you the Squirrel Statue as a reward for completing all 5 hunting requests. Putting it on the mantelpiece in Beecher's Hope unlocks the trophy *It's Art*.

items.title: Dutch - Pipe
items.description: Location: Inside Vetter's Echo Cabin, lying on a desk. Tip: There's a bear inside the cabin - if you enter from the rear you'll get to attack it first. Deliver 5 requested items to unlock the Errand Boy trophy / achievement. The items will spawn regardless of progression, but the gang will only request them during certain chapters.

items.title: Mary-Beth - Fountain Pen
items.description: Location: Inside Osman Grove Cabin, in a nightstand drawer. Requirements: Chapter 2 Deliver 5 requested items to unlock the Errand Boy trophy / achievement. The items will spawn regardless of progression, but the gang will only request them during certain chapters.

items.title: Pearson - Naval Compass
items.description: Location: In the boathouse. Requirements: Chapter 2, 3, or 4. Note - Pearson will only request the item while playing poker with him. Deliver 5 requested items to unlock the Errand Boy trophy / achievement. The items will spawn regardless of progression, but the gang will only request them during certain chapters.

items.title: Molly - Pocket Mirror
items.description: Location: Martha's Swain Cabin, inside a bedside table's drawer in the bedroom. Requirements: Chapter 3 Deliver 5 requested items to unlock the Errand Boy trophy / achievement. The items will spawn regardless of progression, but the gang will only request them during certain chapters.

items.title: Sadie - Harmonica
items.description: Location: Lying on some shelves Requirements: Chapters 3 & 4 (after completing "Further Questions of Female Suffrage") Deliver 5 requested items to unlock the Errand Boy trophy / achievement. The items will spawn regardless of progression, but the gang will only request them during certain chapters.

items.title: Lenny - Silver Pocket Watch
items.description: Location: Inside Vetter's Echo Cabin, on a desk. Requirements: Chapters 2, 3 & 4 Tip: There's a bear inside the cabin - if you enter from the rear you'll get to attack it first. Deliver 5 requested items to unlock the Errand Boy trophy / achievement. The items will spawn regardless of progression, but the gang will only request them during certain chapters.

items.title: Hosea - The Case of the Shrew in the Fog
items.description: Location: On a coffee table inside the house Requirements: Chapters 2, 3 or 4. Note - You must pick up The Deceitful German book beside Hosea. To trigger the quest, he'll need to see you reading between 08:00 - 20:00 Deliver 5 requested items to unlock the Errand Boy trophy / achievement. The items will spawn regardless of progression, but the gang will only request them during certain chapters.

items.title: Jack - Penny Dreadful Comic Book
items.description: Location: Osman Grove Cabin, inside a drawer. Requirements: Chapter 2 (complete "A Fisher of Men") Note: This is one of five possible locations Deliver 5 requested items to unlock the Errand Boy trophy / achievement. The items will spawn regardless of progression, but the gang will only request them during certain chapters.

items.title: Tilly - Gold Pendant Necklace
items.description: Location: Bottom floor. In the cabinet next to the stairs. Note: It doesn't need to be this necklace specifically; any will do. Deliver 5 requested items to unlock the Errand Boy trophy / achievement. The items will spawn regardless of progression, but the gang will only request them during certain chapters.

items.title: Legendary Bharati Grizzly Bear
items.description: Test your hunting skills by tracking down unique wildlife. Their pelts can be traded to Trappers to unlock cosmetics and gear; animal parts can be traded to Fences for talismans. Within the designated area, interact with all yellow clues to reveal the animal's precise location. Before searching, make sure you receive the following on-screen message: *“You have entered Legendary Animal Territory. Hunt this Legendary Animal by finding and inspecting clues”.*

items.title: Legendary Northern Pike
items.description: Requirements: Only found during stranger side mission - *The Veteran - II* which can only be started in Chapter 6. Note: Not required for *Zoologist* & *Skin Deep* achievements. Can only be caught once.

items.title: Mysterious Hill Home
items.description: Points of Interest can be inspected to add them to your journal and map.

items.title: Meteor House
items.description: This cabin has a hole in the roof where a meteorite has come through and killed the inhabitants. The room is smoking and the bodies are burned. Inside you can collect the meteorite. Points of Interest can be inspected to add them to your journal and map.

items.title: Strange Statues Cave
items.description: Puzzle: Each statue has a certain number of fingers. You need to push the buttons on the statues that have the number of fingers: 2, 3, 5 and 7 (prime numbers). One of the statues is missing an arm, which can be found in a pile of rocks in the corner of the cave. This statue will represent 7. If you accidentally press a button on an incorrect statue, you can push the button back out by pressing a button on the back of the statue. The order that you select does not matter. It's hard to see this button, so use Eagle Eye and first person view. Reward: 3 x Gold Bar (3 x $500) Points of Interest can be inspected to add them to your journal and map.

items.title: Strange Statues - Painting
items.description: This area has a big rock formation with a hole in the middle of it. Head into the circular opening in the big rock to inspect a painting. Before or after discovering this painting, you can visit the Strange Statues Cave and solve its puzzle to earn three gold bars (which fetch a price of $500 each.) Points of Interest can be inspected to add them to your journal and map.

items.title: Giant Remains
items.description: Follow the path south-east. The skeleton is under a large overhanging rock. Points of Interest can be inspected to add them to your journal and map.

items.title: Pagan Ritual
items.description: Home to the Pagan Skull Mask and a bottle of Valerian Root. Points of Interest can be inspected to add them to your journal and map.

items.title: Tiny Church
items.description: A tiny church for a tiny congregation Points of Interest can be inspected to add them to your journal and map.

items.title: Mammoth Skeleton
items.description: Points of Interest can be inspected to add them to your journal and map.

items.title: Hermit Woman
items.description: A solitary woman living alone with several feral dogs. Some theorize that she moved to this location to become a witch. Points of Interest can be inspected to add them to your journal and map.

items.title: Native Burial Site
items.description: A Stone Hatchet can be found in the centre of its large stone circle. Points of Interest can be inspected to add them to your journal and map.

items.title: Pleasance
items.description: Points of Interest can be inspected to add them to your journal and map.

items.title: Face in Cliff
items.description: A Mount Rushmore-esque face carved into the mountain. Approach from the north to make it to the top. The sculptor has died by suicide and left a note which you can retrieve from his body - "Note from the Sculptor" Points of Interest can be inspected to add them to your journal and map.

items.title: Barrel Rider
items.description: A thrill seeker went over Donner Falls in a barrel. It ended exactly how you'd expect. Points of Interest can be inspected to add them to your journal and map.

items.title: Crashed Airship
items.description: The wreckage of a flying machine with a corpse inside. This may be an Easter Egg referencing the Kinnear family from Red Dead Redemption 1. Charles Kinnear creates an ill-fated flying machine in the 'Deadalus and Son' side mission, and another of his machines can be found in this game when exploring New Austin. The wreck here _could_ be the work of Charles' brother Percival, as the corpse wears remarkably similar glasses to Charles. Points of Interest can be inspected to add them to your journal and map.

items.title: Manmade Mutant
items.description: A gruesome frankenstein experiment, made from various animal parts. Enter the building by climbing through the window on the second floor, above the southwest porch. Points of Interest can be inspected to add them to your journal and map.

items.title: Abandoned Church
items.description: Points of Interest can be inspected to add them to your journal and map.

items.title: Oil Derrick
items.description: A letter from the vice president of Cornwall Kerosene & Tar can be found on the body by the Derrick, while Dinosaur Bone #3 is inside it. Ginseng Elixir can be found in the abandoned camp. Points of Interest can be inspected to add them to your journal and map.

items.title: Abandoned Trading Post
items.description: Lift up one of the floor planks to reveal a hidden stash. Points of Interest can be inspected to add them to your journal and map.

items.title: Circus Wagons
items.description: A fortune telling machine can be found inside the blue wagon. Points of Interest can be inspected to add them to your journal and map.

items.title: Bolger Glade
items.description: Approach the cannons in the middle of the battlefield to add this POI to your journal. Points of Interest can be inspected to add them to your journal and map.

items.title: Defaced Grave
items.description: Points of Interest can be inspected to add them to your journal and map.

items.title: Donkey Lady
items.description: Inspect the corpse of a woman with a donkey skull tied to the wheel. This is a reference to a glitch in the first Red Dead Redemption, where the game would spawn an NPC with the behaviour and face of a donkey. The glitch became popular after YouTube channel WhereDaBootz made a video showcasing the glitch. Points of Interest can be inspected to add them to your journal and map.

items.title: Faces in Trees
items.description: Points of Interest can be inspected to add them to your journal and map.

items.title: Flying Machine
items.description: The wreckage of a flying machine, with "Charles Kinnear" written on the back. This references a character of the same name from the first Red Dead Redemption, who creates an ill-fated flying machine in the 'Deadalus and Son' side mission. The wreck here is likely to be the work of a younger Charles, who clearly did not improve his craft with age. Points of Interest can be inspected to add them to your journal and map.

items.title: Obelisk
items.description: A 3-sided stone obelisk mounted on a square stone. On the west side, a plaque is located that contains the date 1771 and the latin phrase, "Hora fugit, ne tardes" which translates to "The hour flees, don't be late", a popular motto often used on sun dials. Pull the plaque off and you'll find a gold earring and another treasure map. Points of Interest can be inspected to add them to your journal and map.

items.title: Old World Scripts
items.description: Engraved on the boulder on top of the ledge. Roughly translates to: _We Arrived By Boat Beautiful Land Gracious People We Left Them To Live In Peace_ Points of Interest can be inspected to add them to your journal and map.

items.title: Homestead Stash - Chez Porter
items.description: Requirements: Chapter 2 Climb up a ladder inside the barn to the above floor to find the stash box next to some hay stacks. The treasure box contains 2 x $50 and a jewelry bag. Be sure to loot everything else in the houses too.

items.title: Homestead Stash - Aberdeen Pig Farm
items.description: Requirements: Chapter 2 When you arrive at the farm, there's a guy sitting on the porch who greets you. Greet him back, talk to him and follow him inside his house. Then rob the place. Also be sure to go back outside and enter the door at the southern side of the house. This lets you in the room with the stash. This door is closed until you have followed the guy inside his house. It’s a little lockbox with 2 x $20 inside, be sure to loot that alongside everything else in the house.

items.title: Homestead Stash - Lonnie's Shack
items.description: Requirements: Chapter 2 Inside Lonnie's Shack there are 4 guys. Kill 3 of them but keep 1 alive. Aim your gun at the last surviving guy and threaten him. Then he tells you the location of the stash. This will be different depending on who is the last guy alive. Important: Make a manual save beforehand. If you don't interrogate the last guy, you can't pick up the stash.

items.title: Homestead Stash - Van Horn Mansion
items.description: Go here early in the game to find two residents inside. Enter at night time and you'll find two people sleeping on the lower floor. Steal the money from their table and loot everything else in the house.

items.title: Homestead Stash - Catfish Jacksons
items.description: There's either a dad and his son inside or just the son. You can get the shotgun from the living room and threaten the son so he tells you the stash location. It's outside of the house, on the side to the right of the entrance. There’s a little hole on the side of the house with a crate inside. Loot the crate and be sure to loot everything inside as well, especially the Premium Cigarette Packs in the chest of the son's room and the shotgun from living room.

items.title: Homestead Stash - Watson's Cabin
items.description: In Watson's Cabin you find an old lady. Enter her house and use the ladder in the back to climb down into the cellar. Steal her Semi-Automatic Shotgun and leave. Return to the cabin the next day, and you'll encounter the lady's four sons. Kill them all and a lockbox will now be available on the kitchen table that was previously not there. The lockbox is the secret stash and contains 1 x $73. Bonus: Check the nightstand drawer for a Gold Earring.

items.title: Homestead Stash - Willard's Rest
items.description: Requirements: Available after completing the first story mission in Chapter 6 Talk to the resident here and teach her how to hunt. Return 2 days later. When you return, have a shooting contest with her and then you can loot her lockbox. Be sure to loot everything else too.

items.title: Shop Robbery: Rhodes Gunsmith
items.description: Talk to the trapped man through the basement window of the Gunsmith. Once he tells you his story, you can hold up the owner of the store and make him take you to the basement. From there you can loot the room, free the man, and find a Lancaster Repeater.

items.title: Shop Robbery: Strawberry General Store
items.description:
Have a look through the basement window before entering the store. Afterwards, head inside and hold up the owner to make him open the trapdoor to the basement. If you threaten him further, he'll show you a loose brick in the wall.  

Inspect the brick and loot the basement to complete the robbery.

items.title: Robbery: Saint Denis Gunsmith
items.description:
There's a security door inside the gunsmith that you should knock on before holding up the owner. Once he opens the door for you, kill the guard on the other side and go to the top floor of the building. You'll find an illegal poker room to loot, as well as a secret safe that the players will show you if you threaten them.  

Bonus points if you can complete the robbery without a single shot fired!

items.title: Robbery: Valentine Doctor
items.description: You can knock on the door either at the back of the building or inside the doctor's surgery before holding up the doctor and forcing him to open the back room. Try to escape quickly to avoid a large bounty, but don't forget the money and the Schofield Revolver.

items.title: Coach Robbery: Hector (I, II & III)
items.description: Requirements: Complete *Friends in Very Low Places* (Chapter 3) Hector is a clerk in Strawberry post office who will give you a total of 3 coach robbery missions. Buy the information from him and read the notes in your satchel to find mission details and the coach locations. Stolen coaches can be taken to the wagon fence at Emerald Ranch.

items.title: Coach Robbery: Alden (I, II & III)
items.description: Requirements: Complete *Friends in Very Low Places* (Chapter 3) Alden is a clerk in Rhodes post office who will give you a total of 3 coach robbery missions. Buy the information from him and read the notes in your satchel to find mission details and the coach locations. Stolen coaches can be taken to the wagon fence at Emerald Ranch.

items.description: In Watson's Cabin you find an old lady. Enter her house and use the ladder in the back to climb down into the cellar. Steal her Semi-Automatic Shotgun and leave. Return to the cabin the next day, and you'll encounter the lady's four sons. Kill them all and a lockbox will now be available on the kitchen table that was previously not there. The lockbox is the secret stash and contains 1 x $73. Bonus: Check the nightstand drawer for a Gold Earring. Approach shacks to have them added to your map like landmarks.

items.title: Catfish Jacksons
items.description: There's either a dad and his son inside or just the son. You can get the shotgun from the living room and threaten the son so he tells you the stash location. It's outside of the house, on the side to the right of the entrance. There’s a little hole on the side of the house with a crate inside. Loot the crate and be sure to loot everything inside as well, especially the Premium Cigarette Packs in the chest of the son's room and the shotgun from living room. Approach shacks to have them added to your map like landmarks.

items.title: All That Glitters - Jack Hall Gang Map 1
items.description: Note: May not spawn until starting All That Glitters. Approach Caliban's Seat from the south and you will be able to ride to the top. Upon reaching the top, before going to the small camp at the very end, head down to the right and follow the path along the narrow cliff-side. There, you'll find the treasure map in a small gap in the wall along with a pearl necklace - you can sell it or give it to Tilly when she requests one in Chapter 2. _The next map is found here._

items.title: All That Glitters - Jack Hall Gang Map 2
items.description: Note: May not spawn until you've found All That Glitters - Jack Hall Gang Map 1. Search the pile of rocks with the large rock on top. _The final treasure is found here._

items.title: All That Glitters - Jack Hall Gang Treasure
items.description: Approach the island from the peninsula on the western side to avoid drowning. Use the boat near a shack on the eastern shore, or swim to reach the small island in the middle of the lake and inspect the bushes. The treasure is hidden under a rock. Treasure: Gold Bar x2 Note: May not appear until you've found Map 1 and Map 2.

items.title: Money Lending and Other Sins
items.description:
~$35 inside the tree with a hole in it

You need Chick's Treasure Map.

items.title: Poisonous Trail Treasure Hunt - Map 2
items.description: The Poisonous Trail Map 2 is inside the hollow tree at Face Rock

items.title: Poisonous Trail Treasure Hunt - Map 3
items.description: On top of the Serpent Mound, you'll find Poisonous Trail Map 3 in the stones that look like a nest of eggs.

items.title: Poisonous Trail Treasure
items.description: NB: Bring a lantern to see inside the cave, and make sure you've collected the Poisonous Trail Treasure Hunt - Map 3, or this treasure won't spawn. Walk through the waterfall to find the secret cave. Climb over the first ledge, and drop down the steep drop. Look for another steep path to the right, and head down it. If you come to a massive chamber with natural light breaking through, you've gone too far. You'll come to a small triangular tunnel entrance that you have to crouch to go through. Take the right-hand path after going through. When this chamber opens up, you'll see a ledge that you need to run and jump off. You'll land below it and slide down into some water, and then you can climb up one last ledge and search for a boulder to find 4 x gold bars ($500).

items.title: Poisonous Trail Treasure Hunt - Start
items.description: Requirements: Start The Noblest of Men, and a Woman You need to kill Flaco Hernandez, and then search his cabin to find the Poisonous Trail Map 1.

items.title: High Stakes Treasure Map - Map 2
items.description: Requirements: High Stakes Treasure Map 1 The second map is located behind the waterfall here. You must climb up a log to enter the waterfall. Tip: Use first person view if you can't see anything after entering the waterfall. Next Map: High Stakes Treasure Map - Map 3

items.title: High Stakes Treasure Map - Map 3
items.description: Requirements: High Stakes Treasure Map - Map 2 The third map is located inside a hole in a log that bridges from the island to the shore. To access the log, you must approach from the south side of the island.

items.title: High Stakes Treasure
items.description: Requirements: High Stakes Treasure Map - Map 3 When facing the river, take the left path along the cliff edge. You'll pass a Rock Carving on the way. Take the path above it. You'll then need to jump down a gap. And then fall down once more (you'll take damage this time). Then crawl under a nearby ledge, and there you'll find 3 x gold bars ($500 each)

items.title: Otis Miller's Treasure
items.description: Hidden inside a small cave. Note: Only available from Epilogue 1 onward.

items.title: Reed Cottage Treasure - Start
items.description: Located inside the chimney in Reed Cottage

items.title: Reed Cottage Treasure
items.description: Requirements: Sketched Treasure Map from Reed Cottage Reward: 1 Gold Ingot ($300) Located under a small rock behind a larger rock in the open.

items.title: Gold Bar
items.description: Requirements: Chapter 4 onwards. SPOILERS: The treasure is located a few steps left of the corpse, inside a lockbox that's under a wall to the left of the doorway.

items.title: Le Tresor Des Morts Treasure - Start
items.description: Inside the jail cell on the bed. Note: Only available to those who pre-ordered the digital version of Red Dead Redemption 2 for the PlayStation 4 or Xbox One prior to August 15, 2018.

items.title: Le Tresor Des Morts Treasure - Map 2
items.description: Prerequisites: Le Tresor Des Morts Treasure Map In the underground passage inside the dirt wall (by the 'X' carved into the beam).

items.title: Le Tresor Des Morts Treasure
items.description: Inside the small chapel - behind one of the plates. Prerequisites: Le Tresor Des Morts Treasure - Map 2 Reward: 6 Gold Bars ($500 each at the Fence).

items.title: The Elemental Trail Treasure Hunt - Start
items.description: Shoot the hanging corpse down to loot the _The Elemental Trail Map 1_ from his corpse.

items.title: The Elemental Trail Treasure Hunt - Map 2
items.description: The Elemental Trail Map 2 is located inside the fireplace in the ruined house.

items.title: The Elemental Trail Treasure Hunt - Map 3
items.description: The Elemental Trail Map 3 is located on the wooden pathway above head. Access via the wooden platform on the hill to the east.

items.title: The Elemental Trail Treasure
items.description: By the grave beside the tree. Reward: Crow Beak Trinket (Looted ammo increased by 10%)

items.title: Landmarks of Riches Treasure Hunt - Start
items.description: Approach the west side of the obelisk where the engraved plaque is located. The map is hidden behind the plaque.

items.title: Landmarks of Riches Treasure Hunt - Map 2
items.description: On the steeple of the Tiny Church

items.title: Landmarks of Riches Treasure Hunt - Map 3
items.description: On top of the Mysterious Hill Home - behind the lower boarded up window.

items.title: Landmarks of Riches Treasure Hunt - Map 4
items.description: Inside the tree on the hill at the center of the Bolger Glade civil war battlefield.

items.title: Landmarks of Riches Treasure
items.description: Under a rock at the base of the sundial on top of Mount Shann Treasure: 6 x Gold Bar Note - You need to have found the Landmarks of Riches Treasure Hunt - Map 4 before it will spawn.

items.title: Gold Bar
items.description: A prisoner chained to the rocks outside of Crawdad Willies Shack will give you the location of this hidden treasure. Location: In the middle of 3 large rocks by a tree.

items.title: Nevada Hat
items.description: Behind the waterfall around the same height as the railroad. Approach from the east and drop down to a path, then head towards the waterfall to find it on a rock. Underneath the hat, you'll find Robert Elliot Patchen's suicide note - a character featured on the Stars of the Stage cigarette cards. Note: There are also some fish (Perch, Chain Pickerel, Bluegill, Rock Bass & Sockeye Salmon) that fall from the waterfall nearby and end up on the cliff edge, making this a very useful spot when attempting Master Hunter Challenge 8.

items.title: Viking Helmet
items.description: In a cave near the stone altar, where the Viking Hatchet is found.

items.title: Lost Letter to Bonnie
items.description:
One of a few potential spawn locations for a 'corpse' that has a letter addressed to Bonnie MacFarlane. He'll hand it to you when you try to loot him.

Two chests can be found nearby, too - their loot includes a Silver Pocket Watch & Gin, Guarma Rum, Shotgun Shells, Money & Chewing Tobacco.

items.title: Pig Mask
items.description: Hanging beside a pig carcass and some sausages in the shack.

items.title: Cat Skull Mask
items.description: Found inside an abandoned building at the water's edge

items.title: Pagan Skull Mask
items.description: This mask is on a corpse surrounded by ritualistic markings on the ground.

items.title: Civil War Hardee Hat
items.description: Found in the basement of Fort Brennand. The basement entrance is behind some creates, at the back right.

items.title: Tricorn Hat
items.description:
This pirate hat is located behind a wooden wall inside the shipwreck.

To get across the water, you can either hijack a boat as it passes, or cross with your horse at the most shallow point

items.title: True Tales of Frank Heck, No.102
items.description: Found on a nightstand inside the shack.

items.title: Meteorite #2
items.description: In the hole in the floor inside the Meteor House

items.title: Black Sheep
items.description: Near the railroad, north of Heartland Overflow. Carries a gold wedding ring that can be sold at a fence, but killing the sheep will decrease your Honor.

items.title: Torn Treasure Map 2
items.description:
Found in a drawer inside the hermit's shack. 

This map is one half of a whole. The other half of the map can be found here.

items.title: Wild West Heroes, No. 132
items.description: Found on a nightstand in the house at Downes Ranch.

items.title: Otis Miller and the Arabian Prince
items.description: Found on a nightstand inside the shack.

items.title: Torn Treasure Map 1

items.title: Otis Miller and the Black-Hearted Lady

items.title: Otis Miller and the Boy from New York

items.title: Abalone Shell Fragment
items.description:
Found inside an old house just north of the Sheriff's Station.

Used to craft the Bison Horn Talisman.

items.title: Ram Skull Mask
items.description:
Found hanging from one of the wooden pillars of the abandoned pergola.

Can be used to conceal your identity while committing crimes.

items.title: Miner's Hat
items.description:
On a corpse beside the Wide-Blade Knife. Use the plunger by the entrance to blow up the rocks in the way.

This hat is super useful, as it has a built-in light - meaning you don't need to carry your lantern to see in the dark.

items.title: Morion Helmet
items.description: Located on the body of the Frozen Settler.

items.title: Cobalt Petrified Wood
items.description:
Found in a chest on a cart, just under a large overhanging rock.

Used to craft a Boar Tusk Talisman at the Fence.

items.title: Ancient Viking Comb
items.description: On a shelf with 4 skulls on it, beside where the Viking Helmet is. Break open the skulls, and the comb will be underneath.

items.title: Scarecrow Hat
items.description: On top of the scarecrow in the field (shoot it off the scarecrow to collect it).

items.title: Female Fertility Statue
items.description: Found inside a lockbox beneath the chair on the porch of the Roadside Brothel.

items.title: Fertility Statue
items.description: Found hidden in the chimney of The Old Bacchus Place.

items.title: Gold Shield
items.description: This item can be taken from Braithwaite Manor, but only during the chapter 3 mission *Blood Feuds, Ancient and Modern*. It is on a mantelpiece downstairs in the first room on the left.

items.title: Ancient Necklace
items.description: Location: In a drawer inside the Scratching Post shack.

items.title: Panoramic Map
items.description: One of many potential spawns for the Panoramic Map, found near a frozen couple as part of a random event.

items.title: Faded Letter
items.description: Location: Under a tree in a lock box. Description: Letter to Douglas Gray from Lucille Braithwaite

items.title: Chinese Skullcap
items.description: Location: Beside the corpse of a Chinese man. On the body you will also find the "Letter to Zhou Yi from Zhou Wei"

items.title: Ancient Arrowhead
items.description: Required: Find all 20 Dreamcatchers If you connect all Dreamcatcher points on the map, it forms the image of a buffalo. Within Elysian Cave, the item is inside the cave painting of the buffalo.

items.title: Hawk Talon Trinket
items.description: Behind the waterfall at Deadboot Creek. Requirements: Chapter 2 onwards Ability: 30% stamina drain decrease when drawing a bow

items.title: Cat Eye Trinket
items.description: In a lock box by a crate. Requirements: Chapter 2 onwards Ability: Permanently increases the length of Fortifying tonic effects by 20%

items.title: Shark Tooth Trinket
items.description: In a lock box by the shipwreck. Requirements: Chapter 2 onwards Ability: Permanently increases player's horse bonding experience by 10%.

items.title: Turtle Shell Trinket
items.description: In a lock box under the stairs. Ability: Permanently increases player's health bar refill speed by 10%.

items.title: Scarecrow Derby Hat
items.description: On the scarecrow

items.title: Scarecrow Sombrero
items.description: Worn by a scarecrow amongst the corn. You can shoot it off once Dutch lifts the ban on guns in Rhodes, or knock the scarecrow over by riding into it with your horse.

items.title: Scarecrow Top Hat
items.description: On the scarecrow. Shoot it off.

items.title: Meteorite #1
items.description: Inside the crater

items.title: Shrunken Head
items.description: Inside the small cabin.  Shoot the small clay jar below the painting to get the Shrunken Head.

items.title: Letter to Uncle Lewis from Elijah
items.description: Found on the body of a runaway slave

items.title: Electric Lantern
items.description: After completing A Bright Bouncing Boy (II), return to his lab after 48 in-game hours have passed.

items.title: Letter to Garfield from Martha
items.description: On a dead soldier, pinned to a tree by a bayonet style rifle stuck through him.  He has a "traitor" sign hanging around his neck, and the letter is in his right pocket area.  You may need to use Dead Eye to see the letter.

items.title: The Lady of the Manor
items.description: Requirements: Epilogue [SPOILERS] You will run into Mary-Beth at the train station and she'll give you a copy of the book, "The Lady of the Manor"

items.title: Letter to Annette from Claude
items.description:
Inside Robard Farm you will find the the corpses of a man and a woman.

Behind the farm, there is another woman's body lying against the wheel of the wagon, with a Cattleman revolver in her hand.  If you loot her body, you will find this letter revealing the reason they are all dead.

items.description:
On top of a crate located at the very south end of the Horseshoe Overlook camp.

Only found during Chapter 2.

items.title: English Spelling Practice
items.description:
Found by the entrance of the burnt church, a letter written by the native students at Fort Riggs.

If you take the first letter of each word, it spells out a secret message:

_Waziya comes with winter breath_    
_His trees stand guard whispering all night that we sleep in our grave_    
_Father fought and died so quickly_     
_Mother dies slow_

items.title: Letter from Cornwall Kerosene and Tar
items.description: Found on a corpse at the Oil Derrick

items.title: Letter to Martha from Garfield
items.description: On the table in the cabin at Martha's Swain.

items.title: Gold Bar & Special Horse Stimulant Pamphlet
items.description: Enter the small wooden Sheriff's building in Limpany and walk behind the desk. Inside the desk there should be a lockbox containing a Special Horse Stimulant Pamphlet and a gold bar.

items.title: Jewelry
items.description: Found in the burned-out ruins of the Adler Ranch.

items.title: Miracle Tonic & Money
items.description: Found in a hollow tree stump on the south side of the Barrow Lagoon.

items.title: Dynamite Arrow Pamphlet, Guarma Rum, Large Jewelry Bag
items.description: Found inside a chest at the foot of a small wooden bridge. Guarma Rum: Slightly increases Stamina and Dead Eye Cores.

items.title: Poison Arrow Pamphlet & Chewing Tobacco
items.description: Hidden inside a lockbox in front of the Mysterious Hill Home. Chewing Tobacco: Restores Dead Eye, slightly fortifies it while damaging the Core.

items.title: Hair Tonic & Kentucky Bourbon
items.description: Inside the witch's hut. Hair Tonic: Increases Hair Growth Kentucky Bourbon: Slightly damages Health Core, moderately increases Stamina and Dead Eye Cores

items.title: Gold Nugget, Platinum Band & Jewelry
items.description: On top of some crates in the Fairwale Shanty Shack. Gold Nugget: Sell to Fence - $25

items.title: Aged Pirate Rum
items.description: Found on top of a rocky ledge, hidden behind the Brandywine Drop - around halfway up the waterfall. Look out for a dead tree on the eastern side to find the path to the ledge.

items.title: Large Jewelry Bag & Money
items.description: Found inside the derailed yellow train carriage (laying on its side) that has fallen off the bridge.

items.title: Large Jewelry Bag & Money
items.description: Found in the small mausoleum east of Shady Belle.

items.title: Money & Aged Pirate Rum
items.description: Found in a lockbox at the foot of a small hut southeast of Shady Belle.

items.title: Large Jewelry Bag | $60 | Platinum Earings, Bill Fold & Gold Pocket Watch
items.description:
There are three separate lockboxes found underneath a ruined wall in the abandoned church.

There is also Aged Pirate Rum on the wall of the church's upper landing.

items.title: Guarma Rum & Express Rifle Cartridges
items.description: Found between two wagon wheels, directly east from Bolger Glade.

items.title: Aged Pirate Rum, Chewing Tobacco & Money
items.description: Found in the space underneath Catfish Jackson's House, on the northwestern side.

items.title: Large Jewelry Bag, Potent Miracle Tonic & Revolver Ammo
items.description: Found on the southernmost island, at the foot of a dead tree hung with drying fish.

items.title: Aged Pirate Rum
items.description: Found inside the shipwreck.

items.title: Large Jewelry Bag & Express Rifle Cartridges
items.description: Found inside the shack at Lone Mule Stead.

items.title: Money
items.description: Found at the bottom of the old well, just south-west of the northernmost hut.

items.title: Chewing Tobacco, Money, Special Bitters Pamphlet
items.description: Inside a lockbox found between the crates that are scattered near an abandoned wagon south of Owanjila Dam.

items.title: Gold Nugget x3
items.description: Found inside a lock box by the wagon on the riverbank.

items.title: Predator Bait, Rifle Cartridges & Special Miracle Tonic Pamphlet
items.description: Found at a blood-spattered tent on the rocky plateau, near the ridge.

items.title: Money
items.description:
Found on the upper floor of the Hanging Dog Ranch, beside the two bunk beds.

There is also a jewellery bag and coin purse on the ground floor inside the cabinet near the fireplace.

items.title: Aged Pirate Rum, Coin Bag & Valerian Root
items.description: - Valerian Root - On top of a tree stump acting as a table on the ground floor. - Aged Pirate Rum & Coin Bag - Found on the upper floor of the cabin.

items.title: Large Jewelry Bag, Money & Small Jewelry Bag x 2
items.description: Found on the edge of the cliff - at the foot of a small dead tree next to two skeletons.

items.title: Aged Pirate Rum, Bill Fold & Coin Bag
items.description: Found on a narrow ledge just below the summit.

items.title: Apple, Guarma Rum, Jewelry & Special Health Cure Pamphlet
items.description: Found in a lockbox on the scaffolding for the Face in Cliff. Approach from the north.

items.title: Guarma Rum, Money & Volatile Dynamite Pamphlet
items.description: Found at Hani's Bethel, in a chest underneath a broken wagon.

items.title: Jewelry, Money & Valerian Root
items.description: Found inside the Beaver Hollow cave, in the westernmost chamber.

items.title: Large Jewelry Bag
items.description:
Found in the cave behind the Elysian Pool Waterfall.

To get here, as you enter the cave crawl down to the bottom of the crevasse on your right.  If you crouch you will find a tunnel dug into the side of the crevasse.  Crawl into the tunnel and take the first turn to your right.  In there will be a loot box with the large jewelry bag

items.title: Money - $45
items.description: Found underneath the southern end of the log bridge.

items.title: Gold Nugget & Small Jewelry Bag
items.description: Found inside the chimney.

items.title: Large Jewelry Bag & Money
items.description: Found underneath a log just west of the abandoned wagon.

items.title: Large Jewelry Bag, Miracle Tonic, Money & Premium Cigarettes
items.description:
Found in a chest underneath the table among the abandoned furniture.

Respawns if you travel far enough away and come back.

items.title: Kentucky Bourbon, Money, Opened Revolver Cartridges
items.description: Found next to the wagon underneath the bridge.

items.title: Guarma Rum, Miracle Tonic & Revolver Cartridges - Regular
items.description: Found underneath the garden shelves on the western side of the Painted Sky House.

items.title: Gold Nugget, Ground Coffee, Miracle Tonic & Volatile Fire Bottle Pamphlet
items.description: Found inside a lockbox in an abandoned campsite within the burned-out forest.

items.title: Aged Pirate Rum & Money
items.description: Found on top of the cliff in a lockbox.

items.title: Chewing Tobacco, Ginseng Elixir, Jewelry & Kentucky Bourbon
items.description: Found in a chest underneath the abandoned wagon at the three-way crossroads.

items.title: Canned Vegetables & Guarma Rum
items.description: Found on the abandoned wagon.

items.title: Chewing Tobacco, Cigar x2, Money & Valerian Root
items.description: At the foot of the ladder at the abandoned watermill, under the canopy to the left of the door. The Valerian Root is at the top of the ladder; when you reach the top, turn left and drop down onto the lower roof. Turn around to find it on a windowsill.

items.title: Special Snake Oil Pamphlet
items.description: Found underneath a floorboard inside the small shack by the railway tracks.

items.title: Money
items.description: Found in a room accessible from the southern side of Aberdeen Pig Farm.

items.title: Bitters & Money
items.description:
In the pirate treasure chest, found underneath the bridge.
- Coin Cup x2
- Bitters

items.title: Bitters, Large Jewelry Bag & Silver Pocketwatch
items.description: Found by the log near the riverbank.

items.title: Health Cure, Money, Special Horse Medicine Pamphlet & Repeater Cartridges - Regular
items.description: Found in the south-eastern corner of the fort in a chest underneath some stairs.

items.title: Chewing Tobacco & Money
items.description: Found in a lockbox underneath a derelict wagon.

items.title: Hair Tonic
items.description: Found inside a lockbox hidden in a tree stump behind the house.

items.title: Fine Brandy, Money Clip, Coin Sack & Cocaine Gum
items.description: Inside abandoned luggage found in the mud on the western side of the railroad tracks.

items.title: Incendiary Buckshot Pamphlet
items.description: Found underneath a floorboard inside the cabin.

items.title: Apple, Miracle Tonic & Snake Oil
items.description: Found next to some crates on the northeastern side of the stables.

items.title: Poison Throwing Knife Pamphlet & Money
items.description: The pamphlet is underneath a floorboard in the middle of the oblong-shaped shack, and a lockbox holding the money is glitched inside the wall - but can be looted by standing behind the bedframe.

items.title: Apple, Chewing Tobacco, Money
items.description: Found inside a lockbox under the wooden floor inside the easternmost shack at Macomb's End.

items.title: Canned Vegetables, Money, Special Horse Reviver Pamphlet
items.description: Found inside a tree stump.

items.title: Money
items.description: Found in a lock box at the foot of a small stone wall.

items.title: Pistol Cartridges - Express & Repeater Cartridges - High Velocity
items.description: Found inside the abandoned mission, in a lock box beneath the section of floor at the rear (next to the break in the wall).

items.title: Potent Miracle Tonic & Rifle Cartridges - High Velocity
items.description: Found underneath the bed in the Silent Stead Shack.

items.title: Explosive Slug Pamphlet, Repeater Cartridges - High Velocity & Rifle Cartridges - High Velocity
items.description: Found just outside the burned-out house of an alchemist.

items.title: Herbivore Bait & Valerian Root
items.description: Found in an abandoned campsite, surrounded by cacti, in a lock box behind the tent.

items.title: Canned Fruit & Canned Vegetables
items.description: Found underneath an abandoned wagon.

items.title: Money & Small Jewelry Bag
items.description: Found underneath a broken table within the farm ruins.

items.title: Ginseng Elixir, Pistol Cartridges - High Velocity & Repeater Cartridges - High Velocity
items.description: Found on the abandoned white wagon - one of the 5 wagons in the circle.

items.title: Gold Nugget & Valerian Root
items.description: Found inside a lockbox at the foot of one of the wagons.

items.title: Crackers, Money, Moonshine & More
items.description: Found underneath the bunk bed inside the southeastern cabin at Benedict Point.

items.title: Pistol Cartridges, Repeater Cartridges & Rifle Cartridges - High Velocity
items.description: Found at the foot of the abandoned wagon.

items.title: Money, Opened Miracle Tonic & Wedding Ring
items.description: Found underneath the bed inside the Rio Del Lobo House.

items.title: Aged Pirate Rum, Gold Nugget & Potent Miracle Tonic
items.description: Found underneath the bed inside the blacksmith's workshop.

items.title: Ginseng Elixir & Letters
items.description:
1) Letter to Henrietta Douglas  
2) Letter to Judge Finley  
3) Letter to Miriam Wegner  
4) Letter to Saint Denis Times Tribune  
5) Letter to William Errington  

Found inside a mail coach, by the road. The Ginseng Elixir is inside a lockbox underneath the letters.

items.title: Homing Tomahawk Pamphlet & Large Jewelry Bag
items.description: Found inside Flattened Cabin. Note: You can't enter through the door, and must walk up a fallen tree to get inside.

items.title: Gold Nugget & Jewellery Pouch
items.description: Location: Inside the chimney. Also, under the building there is a stash of rum and bill stacks.

items.title: Whiskey Tree
items.description:
One of the bottles hanging on this tree contains a gold nugget.  Use Eagle Eye to highlight the correct bottle and shoot it to retrieve the gold nugget.

There is also a Ginseng Elixir in the center of the tree

items.title: 3 Gold Nuggets & Bill Stack
items.description: Location: Inside the large ship, on the lower level

items.title: Ammolite & Fluorite
items.description:
2 unique gemstones are found inside a birds nest on a high ledge of the mountains.  The path to get there is tricky - approach from the north, just above the train tracks, and hop across the rock ledges.

These can be sold to the fence for $25 each, and you'll also come across a lockbox holding Aged Pirate Rum, Bill Fold & Coin Bag on the way.

items.title: 2 x Gold Bar, Aged Pirate Rum & Valerian Root
items.description: Location: Inside the vertical train car. You'll need to drop down into the train car from above, by climbing a small rock passage nearby the carriage.

items.title: Gold Nugget
items.description: Inside a chest near the Civil War Hardee Hat

items.title: Money - $50+ Valerian Root
items.description:
Found in the _Old Trail Rise_ basement, hidden behind a stone in the wall.

The Valerian Root is in the wardrobe.

items.title: Nugget
items.description: Inside Dodd's Bluff Cabin

items.title: Bill Stacks & Aged Pirate Rum
items.description: Several bill stacks in the cellar along with a bottle of aged pirate rum

items.title: Valerian Root
items.description: Valerian root on the fireplace mantle inside the "ranch" below the warped tree.

items.title: Bill Fold
items.description: Bill fold and coin purse on the table amongst other things

items.title: Bill Stacks
items.description: On a table in the northeast corner of the fort. There's a stack on the corner of the nearby dining table too.

items.title: Bill Stacks
items.description: Several bill stacks can be found in the upstairs room on the desk

items.title: Gold Ingot and Naval Compass
items.description: In the back side of the shed, inside a lock box.

items.title: Aged Pirate Rum
items.description: Hani's Bethel - inside the chimney.

items.title: Ginseng Elixir
items.description: On the second floor of The Loft. Western side of the observation deck.

items.title: Money - $15
items.description: Hidden in the floor of the trading post behind a loose plank

items.title: Gold Nugget
items.description:
Inside the mine - next to the corpse of a miner that has a Wide-Blade Knife and Miner's Hat nearby.

Use the plunger at the entrance to blow up the rocks in the way.

items.title: Ginseng Elixir & Crackers
items.description: Near the log, under a fishing rod

items.title: Valerian root & Premium Cigarettes
items.description: Inside the saloon - upstairs on the window ledge facing the river.

items.title: Small Jewelry Bag
items.description: At the campsite - on one of the dead bodies.

items.title: Money Clip, Rum, Potent Snake Oil
items.description:
Money and Potent Snake Oil can be found in the nightstand. 

More money, Kentucky Bourbon, and Repeater Cartridges are under the bed.

items.title: Jewelry, Money Clip, Fine Brandy, Miracle Tonic, Premium Cigarettes
items.description: - Jewelry, Miracle Tonic - Inside a wardrobe left of the fire place - Money Clip - In a drawer on the north side of the room, between two doors. - Fine Brandy, Premium Cigarettes - On the coffee table in the middle of the room.

items.title: Aged Pirate Rum
items.description: At the foot of the dead tree with a wrecked boat in it.

items.title: Ginseng Elixir & Cartridges
items.description: Inside the lock box under the bed.

items.title: Pocket Watch
items.description: In the third drawer from the bottom - on the right of the file cabinet next to the fireplace.

items.title: Valerian Root
items.description: On the leftmost edge of the mantle over the fireplace

items.title: Aged Pirate Rum
items.description: On top of a barrel behind the fishing cabin.

items.title: Valerian Root
items.description: On a shelf in the basement, accessible when robbing the shop.

items.title: Valerian Root
items.description: Next to the cigarette card on the top platform of the windmill.

items.title: Valerian Root & Opened Gin
items.description: On a windowsill in what's left of the second floor. Climb onto the platform to reach it.

items.title: Aged Pirate Rum
items.description: In a small wrecked blue boat.

items.title: Ginseng Elixir
items.description:
On a shelf, left of the fireplace, inside the abandoned schoolhouse.

You can also find a book and cigarette card here.

items.title: Money and Large Jewelry Bag
items.description: Inside the chest on the second floor of the barn. NB: May respawn after a certain amount of time.

items.title: Chest
items.description: Gold pocket watch, fine brandy, and money clip in a chest at the foot of the bed inside Veteran's Homestead

items.title: Aged Pirate Rum
items.description: Underneath a large rock next to a bush, just off the stone path to the lighthouse.

items.title: Gold Nugget & Aged Pirate Rum
items.description:
The Gold Nugget is on top of the desk, on the third floor, accessed when robbing the Saint Denis gunsmith's poker game.

The Aged Pirate Rum is found on the piano on the third floor.

items.title: Ginseng Elixir & Premium Cigarettes
items.description: On top of a bale of cotton near the railing of the upper deck of the boat.

items.title: Aged Pirate Rum
items.description: On the table inside the cabin

items.title: Guarma Rum
items.description: Found inside a lockbox by the skeletons, in a small shelter at the edge of the forest.

items.title: Ginseng Elixir
items.description: On a crate in the northwestern corner of the top of the watchtower

items.title: Valerian Root
items.description: At the pagan ritual site - behind the mask.

items.title: Money, Jewelry
items.description: Inside Radley's House, on a bookshelf in the 2nd bedroom on the right.

items.title: Aged Pirate Rum & Regular Rifle Cartridges
items.description: At the base of a boulder beside the trail you'll find a bottle of aged pirate rum and 2 boxes of regular rifle cartridges.

items.title: Valerian Root
items.description: Found here at an old abandoned camp site on top of Caliban's Seat.

items.title: Ginseng Elixir, Health Cures & Jewelry
items.description: A Ginseng Elixir can be found on the mantle of the fireplace. A mix of health cures can be found in the bedroom. Jewelry can be found in the chest in the bedroom.

items.title: Valerian Root
items.description: On top of a crate.

items.title: Aged Pirate Rum
items.description: To the right of the fireplace, on a plank resting on top of some barrels.

items.title: Coin Purse & Aged Pirate Rum
items.description: Found inside a lockbox and on the window sill inside the burned down shack.

items.title: Coin Purse, Jewellery & Silver Pocket Watch
items.description:
- Silver Pocket Watch
- Coin Purse
- Jewellery
- Apple x 2
- Chocolate Bar
- Cigar
- Cigarettes
- Crackers
- Opened Snake Oil

items.title: Silver Pocket Watch, Kentucky Bourbon, Gin, Premium Cigarettes, Ground Coffee & Crackers
Potent Miracle Tonic, Potent Bitters, Fine Brandy
items.description: Under the stairs in a chest.

items.title: Ginseng Elixir
items.description: Hidden between some large rocks

items.title: Ginseng Elixir, Guarma Rum, Canned Peaches & Canned Salmon
items.description: Inside a crate in the shack.

items.title: Apple & Kentucky Bourbon
items.description: Next to the gravestone of Martha. You'll lose Honor for taking them, obviously.

items.title: Valerian Root
items.description: Located at the top of the coal mining facility tower, on a railing above the cigarette card.

items.title: Premium Cigarettes, Guarma Rum, Assorted Biscuits, Canned Vegetable, Cocaine Gum, Kentucky Bourbon, Gun Oil, Potent Snake Oil, Money
items.description:
- Premium Cigarettes - in a side table next to the window (where you find Torn Treasure Map 1)
- Guarma Rum, Assorted Biscuits - Inside a cabinet in the corner
- Canned Vegetable - On a shelf on your left as you enter
- Cocaine Gum - Inside a side table to your left as you enter
- Canned Vegetable, Kentucky Bourbon - In the cabinet underneath the sink.
- Gun Oil, Potent Snake Oil - Inside the wardrobe opposite the door.
- Coin Purse, Money Clip - In a drawer at the bottom of the wardrobe.

items.title: Aged Pirate Rum & Premium Cigarettes
items.description: At the top of the windmill

items.title: Valerian Root
items.description: Head uphill to find the broken part of the tunnel that protects the trains from mountain debris. Inside, you will find a broken box that contains a bottle of Valerian Root

items.title: Ginseng Elixir, Moonshine, and premium cigarettes
items.description:
On the shelf to the left of the door.
Premium cigarettes on nightstand.

items.title: Valerian Root
items.description: Underneath a rock next to a fishing rod on the west side of the small island.

items.title: Ginseng Elixir
items.description: On the ground inside a hole at the base of a tree.

items.title: Ginseng Elixir
items.description: On a tall, square box next to a torn tent, slightly east of the oil derrick. Loot the whole campsite for some fine brandy and a lock box with some canned food.

items.title: Ginseng Elixir
items.description: Inside the main cabin, in a lockbox on the counter to the right.

items.title: Ginseng Elixir & Throwing Knife
items.description: At the edge of the water tower platform - climb a ladder to access.

items.title: Ginseng Elixir
items.description: At the base of the tree with a fishing rod.

items.title: Valerian Root
items.description: Found on the second floor, in the southwest corner on top of a blue barrel.

items.title: Ginseng Elixir
items.description: Inside the bottom drawer of the wardrobe in the western room.

items.title: Ginseng Elixir
items.description: In the upstairs wardrobe

items.title: Hunter Hatchet
items.description: Location: Behind the cabin, buried in a tree stump A rare hatchet with a long bearded axe bit. This hatchet can also be thrown.

items.title: Ancient Tomahawk
items.description: Location: Found lodged in a broken wooden target overlooking Calumet Ravine in the Grizzlies

items.title: Viking Hatchet
items.description: Found on an old stone altar in the Roanoke Valley area of New Hanover, lodged in a skull. This hatchet can also be thrown.

items.title: Rare Shotgun
items.description:
Held by a Hermit living in the Manito Glade shack. You'll need to kill him (or knock him unconscious) to take the weapon.

He'll only appear the first time you visit the shack, so don't forget to pick it up.

items.title: Broken Pirate Sword
items.description: Lodged inside a shipwreck

items.title: Midnight's Pistol
items.description: Requirements: The Noblest of Man, and a Woman stranger mission. To obtain this pistol, you must kill Billy Midnight. Speak to the train station clerk and he will reveal that Billy Midnight should be on one of the next two trains. Wait outside and board the first train that arrives. Midnight will be in the last wagon. You must chase and duel him.

items.title: Schofield Revolver
items.description:
To obtain the revolver, first you must go to the back of the Doctor's Office and peer through the window.  This will unlock a hidden operation.

Then hold up the store, and kill the men in the back room.  The revolver will be in a box on the table.

items.title: Flaco's Revolver
items.description:
After making progress in The Noblest of Men, and a Woman, you'll come here to chat with Flaco Hernandez. It won't end well, but once he's dead, you can pick up his revolver.

*Note - if you don't pick it up, it may disappear by the time you return.*

items.title: Hewing Hatchet
items.description: Found buried in a tree stump just outside the cabin

items.title: Double Bit Hatchet
items.description: Buried in a tree stump north side of the fence

items.title: Rusted Double Bit Hatchet
items.description: Buried in a tree stump just north of the coal mining facility.

items.title: Granger's Revolver
items.description: Requirements: Start The Noblest of Men, and a Woman Once you kill Emmet Granger in a duel, you can pick up his revolver from his corpse.

items.title: Micah’s Revolver
items.description: Requirements: Complete "American Venom" (Epilogue 2) Micah’s Revolver will be found at the top of Mount Hagen. The weapon is on his frozen corpse.

items.title: Otis Miller's Revolver
items.description: Location: Located in a chest inside a cave with a handful of photographs. Requirements: Both _Torn Treasure Maps_

items.title: Lancaster Repeater
items.description: When facing the gunsmith, go to the right side, to the small window at ground level.  A boy should ask you for help.  This will begin a suspicious activity.  You can then hold up the gunsmith.  Once the boy is free, the weapon will be in a box on the table in the basement.

items.title: Civil War Knife
items.description: Found in the basement of Fort Brennand. The basement entrance is in the hut behind some crates, at the back right.

items.title: Double-Action Revolver
items.description: Requirements: Lonnie's Shack Home Robbery with Sean Time Sensitive Weapon Once you complete the robbery, this weapon will be found under a bunk bed.

items.title: Rusted Hunter Hatchet
items.description: Found in a tree stump to the west of the shack.

items.title: Stone Hatchet
items.description: Found in the middle of a Native Burial Site's large stone circle. Requirements: You must complete a GTA Online Bounty Target Mission to unlock this weapon.

items.title: Wide-Blade Knife
items.description:
Found on a dead body inside Beryl's Dream mine. Press the plunger at the entrance to blow up the rocks in the way.

NB: Bring a lantern, it's dark!

items.title: Antler Knife
items.description: Found on a dead bear.

items.title: Pump-Action Shotgun
items.description: Upstairs in the large house, left of the fireplace

items.title: Double-Barreled Shotgun
items.description: Location: In the cabin above the fireplace. Note: Obtained during the mission _Paying a Social Call_. The cabin becomes locked after the mission.

items.title: Lowry's Revolver (Online)
items.description: NB: Red Dead Online only Requirements: You must solve the Los Santos Slasher mystery in GTA Online and then kill 50 NPCs with the Navy Revolver.

items.title: Ornate Dagger
items.description: Solve the Vampire Mystery to receive the Ornate Dagger

items.title: Carbine Repeater
items.description:
A Carbine Repeater can be found here. It is on top of a hill, in the hands of a corpse sitting upright, half buried in snow. A marker will show on the minimap when you are close.

This is likely a reference to the Hatchet Jack scene of the film Jeremiah Johnson.

items.title: Tomahawk
items.description: A Tomahawk is stuck on the side of the broken wagon

items.title: Calloway's Revolver
items.description: After completing The Noblest of Men, and a Woman, you can pick up Calloway's Revolver SPOILER: You must draw and kill Calloway.

items.title: Rare Rolling Block Rifle
items.description: Found at the end of the mission _Magicians For Sport_. It's on the body of a bounty hunter in the barn. Note: This weapon is only found during the mission. If you don't collect it during your first mission playthrough you will not be able to obtain it - but can still add it to your compendium.

items.title: Semi-Automatic Shotgun
items.description: Found in a weapon's case in the cellar of Watson's Cabin.

items.title: Appaloosa
items.description: This horse doesn't spawn 100% of the time, and appears to spawn randomly around the world. Note: You can also steal this horse from campsites (which might prove easier than trying to get it to spawn in the wild).

items.title: American Paint
items.description: American Paint mixed with Kentucky Saddler.

items.title: Campfire
items.description: Note: Doesn't always spawn

items.title: Harrietum Officinalis Flower
items.description:
In the forest, beside a larger tree (use Eagle Eye to find it)

Collect 3 or 5 of these to transform into an animal (the amount required depends on the animal)

items.title: Twin Rocks
items.description: Note: Only available for owners of the Special / Ultimate Edition of the game. Note: There's a Gold Nugget in the night stand of the middle cabin

items.title: Gaptooth Breach
items.description: Del Lobo's hideout

items.title: Solomon's Folly
items.description:
Del Lobo's hideout.

A huge stack of bills can be found in the basement beneath the burnt house.

items.title: Skinner Brothers Hideout
items.description: NB: The Skinner Brothers hideouts are secret hideouts that don't always spawn.

items.title: Skinner Brothers Hideout
items.description: NB: The Skinner Brothers hideouts are secret hideouts that don't always spawn. This one appears to spawn in the morning.

items.title: Skinner Brothers Hideout
items.description: NB: The Skinner Brothers hideouts are secret hideouts that don't always spawn. This one appears to spawn in the morning.

items.title: Skinner Brothers Hideout
items.description: NB: The Skinner Brothers hideouts are secret hideouts that don't always spawn. This one appears to spawn in the morning.

items.title: High Stakes Treasure Hunter
items.description: Requirements: Chapter 2 To find the High Stakes Treasure Map 1, you'll need to randomly encounter a treasure hunter and take the map from him. There are roughly ~8 different potential spawn points around the New Hanover area. Note: If you fail to recover the map from him on 3 separate occasions, it will become available for purchase at a Fence.

items.title: Nite Folk Victim
items.description: Come here at night, and find a man hung from a tree at the side of the road. After approaching the body, you'll be attacked by three enemies from a faction known as the Nite Folk. After killing them, shoot down the body and loot it to find the "Nite Folk's Victim's Note". The second time you encounter this event, you will find the "Nite Folk Wagerer's Note"

items.title: Ku Klux Klan Meeting
items.description:
Here you can stumble across a comedic KKK meeting.

At night if you get close enough, they might attack you. Killing and looting the dark robed Klansman gives you a "Meeting Notes" letter.

This is one of the random locations.

items.title: Nite Folk: Crying Woman
items.description:
Try wandering the area at night, and you might hear a crying woman.  If you approach her, she'll attack and run away. Shoot her from afar for a closer look at her mottled gray skin and white eyes, or chase her to be attacked by a group of Nite Folk.

Rest assured, it gets creepier. If you camp near the area and sleep until midnight, then activate focus, you'll find the tracks of a "Stranger" leading away from where you were sleeping... right to the "crying" woman.

items.title: Arm Amputation
items.description:
A man on a horse will call for help, and then fall over. He'll ask you to take him to a doctor in Saint Denis, where you can stick around to watch his arm be sawed off.

A few days later, you can find the man being hanged for killing a woman that made fun of his disfigurement. You can help him again, or leave him to his fate.

items.title: Ghost of Agnes Dowd
items.description: Available: Between 9pm - 3am, only when it's foggy. Interaction: Sometimes she will appear as a white ghost, other times she will be invisible. She spawns in this area and can be heard crying. Use your binoculars to see her, as she will fade away if you get too close. You can encounter this event 16 times, with 2 days between each encounter. Each time she will have unique dialog. After the 16th time she won't spawn again.

items.title: Cave Hermit
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward Interaction: There are 5 possible stages, each available at least 3 in-game days after the previous one. You'll need to stay in his presence long enough to hear all the man has to say (and to actually see him), even if he asks you to go away.

items.title: Blind Man Cassidy (I)
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward Interaction: This mystical blind man will tell fortunes if given a dollar. He is available in many different locations and at any time. You must wait 3 in-game days to trigger a new meeting after each encounter, with 18 potential stages to experience before Chapter 6. Reaching the Epilogue will give you a further 8 stages.

items.title: Blind Man Cassidy (II)
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward Interaction: This mystical blind man will tell fortunes if given a dollar. He is available in many different locations and at any time. You must wait 3 in-game days to trigger a new meeting after each encounter, with 18 potential stages to experience before Chapter 6. Reaching the Epilogue will give you a further 8 stages.

items.title: Blind Man Cassidy (III)
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward Interaction: This mystical blind man will tell fortunes if given a dollar. He is available in many different locations and at any time. You must wait 3 in-game days to trigger a new meeting after each encounter, with 18 potential stages to experience before Chapter 6. Reaching the Epilogue will give you a further 8 stages.

items.title: Blind Man Cassidy (IV)
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward Interaction: This mystical blind man will tell fortunes if given a dollar. He is available in many different locations and at any time. You must wait 3 in-game days to trigger a new meeting after each encounter, with 18 potential stages to experience before Chapter 6. Reaching the Epilogue will give you a further 8 stages.

items.title: Hermit
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward Interaction: The hermit will shoot to kill if he sees a trespasser. If you take him out, you can loot his house for collectibles and get his rare shotgun.

items.title: Poor Joe
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward Interaction: Poor Joe lives in a tree near the edge of the map. There are three stages of interaction, and you must wait at least 3 in-game days between each one. The final interaction is only available from Epilogue 1 onward.

items.title: Mad Preacher (I)
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward Interaction: This guy appears in 3 different rivers, each time at least 3 in-game days after the previous encounter. A 4th stage becomes available to the southwest of Tumbleweed after the Epilogue.

items.title: Mad Preacher (II)
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward Interaction: This guy appears in 3 different rivers, each time at least 3 in-game days after the previous encounter. A 4th stage becomes available to the southwest of Tumbleweed after the Epilogue.

items.title: Mad Preacher (III)
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward Interaction: This guy appears in 3 different rivers, each time at least 3 in-game days after the previous encounter. A 4th stage becomes available to the southwest of Tumbleweed after the Epilogue.

items.title: Mad Preacher (IV)
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward Interaction: The Mad Preacher appears in 3 different rivers, each time at least 3 in-game days after the previous encounter. A 4th stage becomes available to the southwest of Tumbleweed after the Epilogue.

items.title: Tumbleweed Sheriff
items.description: Availability: Epilogue 1 onward Interaction: There are 3 possible encounters, each at least 3 in-game days after the previous one.

items.title: Gavin's Friend (VII)
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward - multiple locations. Note the Rhodes location is locked while the *No Good Deed* stranger mission is open. Interaction: This man can appear at 3 different locations throughout the game, and a further 4 locations from Epilogue 1 onward. He is searching for his friend Gavin. Looting him will give you the *Letter to Nigel from Tom*, which will help you to understand his story.

items.title: Gavin's Friend (VI)
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward - multiple locations. Note the Rhodes location is locked while the *No Good Deed* stranger mission is open. Interaction: This man can appear at 3 different locations throughout the game, and a further 4 locations from Epilogue 1 onward. He is searching for his friend Gavin. Looting him will give you the *Letter to Nigel from Tom*, which will help you to understand his story.

items.title: Captain Russell
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward Interaction: There are 3 stages to experience, with 3 in-game days between each one. 2 additional stages are unlocked from Epilogue 1 onward.

items.title: Chelonian Master
items.description: Availability: Complete Epilogue 2 Interaction: The leader of a cult that worships turtles can be seen jumping off a cliff with his followers.

items.title: Dr. Macintosh
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward Interaction: By accepting the doctor's book and returning at least 3 in-game days later, you unlock a second interaction.

items.title: Thomas Downes
items.description: Availability: Between the beginning of Chapter 2 and *Sodom? Back to Gomorrah* (Chapter 3) Interaction: There are 2 different conversations to experience: one before completing *Americans at Rest* (Chapter 2), and one after.

items.title: Jon
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward - between 12PM & 6AM Interaction: This guy can be seen ranting in Valentine's Smithfields saloon. If you stay close, he will eventually attack you. Knock him out to pick up his raccoon mountain hat. You can also return at a later date to find him in the saloon - without his hat. If you wear his hat in front of him, he'll attack you again.

items.title: Constipated Man
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2, after completing *Polite Society, Valentine Style* Interaction: A constipated man can be heard struggling inside room 2A at the hotel in Valentine.

items.title: Nicholas Timmins
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward - between 8AM & 8PM Interaction: Nicholas Timmins, the mayor of Strawberry, is welcoming people to his town. 3 interactions can be triggered (the first 2 at the Welcome Center, the 3rd in the main street), with at least 2 in-game days between them.

items.title: Reverend
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward - between 8AM & 7PM Interaction: After your initial encounter, you can meet him again if you come back at least 24 in-game hours later. Note: There are three stages of interaction. The final interaction is only available from Epilogue 1 onward.

items.title: Homeless Vet Mickey (I)
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward Interaction: This guy asks for money at 2 possible spots in Valentine. There are 6 stages of interaction, with a minimum of 3 in-game days between each one. A 7th stage is unlocked from Epilogue 1 onward.

items.title: Homeless Vet Mickey (II)
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward Interaction: This guy asks for money at 2 possible spots in Valentine. There are 6 stages of interaction, with a minimum of 3 in-game days between each one. A 7th stage is unlocked from Epilogue 1 onward.

items.title: Dorothea
items.description: Availability: From Chapter 2 onward - between 8AM & 6PM Interaction: A suffragette who appears in Saint Denis. After your first encounter, you can experience a second one by coming back at least 1 in-game day later.

items.title: Anders Helgerson
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward - between 8AM & 6PM Interaction: A recruiter for the Chelonian Cult, Anders will offer you a pamphlet if you talk to him.

items.title: Eugenics Proponent
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward - between 8AM & 6PM Interaction: If you accept a pamphlet from this man, a cutscene ensues. He will run away from you at the next encounter (which is available 1 in-game day after the first).

items.title: Timothy Donahue
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward Interaction: This guy sells a book - *Get Rich Quick* - for $50. If you come back at least 2 in-game days later, you can demand a refund - though you will have to chase him down and loot him for it.

items.title: Lillian Powell
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward - between 9AM & 9PM Interaction: A drunk, aging writer in the Saint Denis saloon. There are 4 stages to experience, each one 3 in-game days after the last.

items.title: Sonny
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward Interaction: This creepy guy lives in a cabin in the Bayou Nwa. If you accept his invitation to come inside, you will wake up in the wilderness with some of your money missing and your cores exhausted. Although, returning to the cabin and getting your revenge can be profitable.

items.title: Joe Butler
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward Interaction: Joe can be found begging outsides Rhodes General Store. There are initially 3 stages of interaction, with 3 in-game days between them. A 4th one is unlocked from Epilogue 1 onward.

items.title: Soothsayer (I)
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward Interaction: An old and near-blind woman tells fortunes in exchange for money. There are 15 interaction stages, with 3 in-game days between them and her location alternating between the Bayou and Bluewater Marsh, The first 10 interactions can be triggered between Chapters 2 - 6, and the last 5 once you begin Epilogue 1.

items.title: Soothsayer (II)
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 onward Interaction: An old and near-blind woman tells fortunes in exchange for money. There are 15 interaction stages, with 3 in-game days between them and her location alternating between the Bayou and Bluewater Marsh, The first 10 interactions can be triggered between Chapters 2 - 6, and the last 5 once you begin Epilogue 1.

items.title: Armadillo Town Crier (I)
items.description: Availability: Epilogue 1 onward - between 8AM & 7PM Interaction: This guy appears in two spots in Armadillo, warning you about a cholera outbreak.

items.title: Armadillo Town Crier (II)
items.description: Availability: Epilogue 1 onward - between 8AM & 7PM Interaction: This guy appears in two spots in Armadillo, warning you about a cholera outbreak.

items.title: Del Lobo Execution
items.description: Availability: Epilogue 1 onward A deputy turns in a Del Lobo in Tumbleweed and the Sheriff executes the outlaw. Mission Unlocked: Two bounty hunter missions - *Joaquin Arroyo* & *Esteban Cortez*

items.title: Castor's Ridge Homestead
items.description: Interaction: Here you'll find a man and his sons building a house. Return here frequently to receive small side quests from them. There are 4 stages in total. Availability: Available until Epilogue

items.title: Appleseed Timber
items.description: A small lumber camp in the forest. Availability: Until chapter 6 Interaction: There are 3 stages to this event. Speak to the foreman to begin the 1st stage.

items.title: Central Union Railroad
items.description: Availability: Until the first part of the epilogue Interaction: There are 3 stages to experience. Note that the camp will move slightly north-west as the stages progress

items.title: Valentine Hotel Robbery - Room 1B
items.description: A stranger here will tell you that his friend double-crossed him, and he wants to get him back. You'll need to rob the friend's room (1B, bottom floor, opposite the baths) in the nearby Valentine Hotel. You'll find $50 there, and you'll have the option to split the money with the stranger, or break your word and keep all $50. NB: Some users have mentioned that they cannot find any loot inside the hotel room. It's unknown if this is a bug or not.

items.title: Sun Worshipper #2
items.description: Requirements: Unlocked after Epilogue 1. NB: You need to wait 3 in-game days between Sun Worshipper encounters

items.description: Requirements: Unlocked after Epilogue 1. NB: You need to wait 3 in-game days between Sun Worshipper encounters
