items.title: A Hunter's Request
items.description: Help a hunter find his missing friend Location: The hunter will be wandering this area calling out for his friend "Tucker"

items.title: Lost New Yorker
items.description: Availability: Chapter 2 Interaction: A lost New Yorker asks for help finding the way to Strawberry

items.title: Feral Man (Wolfman)
items.description:
Follow the howls to encounter a naked wolf man and find his cave.

Note: May not spawn every time

items.title: Mexican Gunslinger Challenge (I)
items.description: Here you will meet a man who challenges you to shoot the most bottles.  You can win a small amount of money in the bet.

items.title: Tree House Man
items.description: Interaction: Upon approaching this tree house, a strange man will start to yell at you. The floorboards can be shot and destroyed to bring him crashing down to earth.

items.title: Mexican Gunslinger Challenge (II)
items.description: Here, you will again meet a man who wants his revenge after round 1! You can win a small amount of money in the bet.

items.title: Man Taking Care of His Horse
items.description: A stranger is trying to heal the foot of his mount, a female American Standardbred, with a rare dapple palomino coat. Your arrival will startle him, and his horse may fatally kick him in the head. Occasionally, you can also save him. Tip: If the horse kicks him and bolts, you can chase it down and catch it.

items.title: O'Driscoll's Beating a Debtor
items.description:
You can encounter two O'Driscolls beating a man near a tree. They demand the man pays them what he owes - what happens next is up to you.

_If you intervene,_ you'll receive Honor after fighting the two O'Driscolls. 

_If you do not intervene,_ the man is knocked out and you will lose Honor.

items.title: Bridge Barricade
items.description: When crossing the bridge here - you may find that a group of 5 O'Driscoll's have barricaded it with a wagon. After a shootout, you can loot the wagon (and even sell the wagon itself to the Wagon Fence) Note: It's possible this event may appear at other bridges in the region.

items.title: Wolf Attack
items.description: Here you'll find a man being attacked by a wolf - you will gain honour for helping him. You may also find a gold nugget in the saddlebags of his horse. NB: This event may randomly occur north of Bacchus Station instead of here

items.title: Kidnapping (I)
items.description: A woman can be heard shouting in the distance - after which you'll see a galloping horseman and a woman tied up on the back of his horse. If you save her - you'll receive an honour increase.

items.title: Grand Theft Horse (I)
items.description: Interaction: A Mexican stranger will ask you for help because he has lost his horse. If you offer to help him, he may attempt to steal your horse - so be wary!

items.title: Prisoner Encounter
items.description: Interaction: A prisoner chained to the rocks may ask you to shoot his chains off. If you free him, he'll give you the location of this buried Gold Bar Availability: Chapter 3 onwards. Not available once epilogue has started

items.title: Blind Man Cassidy
items.description: Potential location for Blind Man Cassidy

items.title: Back Alley Mugging
items.description: Encounter: At night you may encounter a stranger calling you over in the street, saying he sells weapons. If you follow him into the alley you will be held up by three men and knocked out. You'll wake up by the harbor a lot poorer. You may then return and get your money back.

items.title: Duel With a Drunk
items.description: Availability: Day time Interaction: When walking into the bar, a drunkard may bump into you and then challenge you to a duel.

items.title: Bondage Show ("Big Hank Likes a Spank")
items.description: Interaction: At night, if you peer through the window of the house, you'll find a woman spanking a bare-assed man, while the man is yipping "I was a bad boy". You can watch it until you get caught and you lose honor.

items.title: O'Driscoll Ambush (I)
items.description: Interaction: A cart and several O'Driscolls emerge from the brush to rob you. If you fight and win - you can sell the cart. Note: If Kieran is part of your gang in the game, the dialogue will be different because they will recognize you as a member of the Van Der Linde gang.

items.title: The Accident
items.description: At night, a prostitute may ask for your help disposing of a body. She killed a man up in her room in the saloon and needs help dealing with it. She will reward you with money, and if you come back in a few days, she'll approach you again with a similar problem. If you help her again you'll lose Honor. Tip: Return to Valentine in the Epilogue and speak to the bartender in the Saloon. He'll tell you that the prostitute was actually a serial killer and has been caught; pay a visit to the sheriff's office to find her in one of the jail cells. After this, you can witness her execution by hanging near the Butcher.

items.title: Wagon Accident
items.description: You may find a stranger here calling you over to the cliff and pointing down below. If you look over you'll see that a wagon appears to have fallen off the cliff. Search the body down below to find the Bride's Photograph, and a lockbox on the wagon to find the Wedding Certificate.

items.title: Cougar Attack
items.description: Interaction: A man can be found hiding in a tree from a cougar here. Kill the cougar to save him and gain Honor. Availability: Anytime (?)

items.title: Woeful Lover
items.description: Interaction: Here you may meet a young man skimming stones across the river. You can give him relationship advice to cheer him up.

items.title: Panning for Gold
items.description: Interaction: Here you may find a man panning for gold by the river. If approached the man will say he hasn't found anything and request you move along. If you remain in the area there is a chance the man will find a gold nugget.

items.title: Couple Smoking Opium
items.description: Interaction: At night, you can see two men peeking through the window. If you peak inside you will see a man and a woman rolling around on the bed and floor while smoking a pipe. You can chase the men away to gain honor, but you will lose honor for peeking yourself, and continue to lose more honor if you stay and watch.

items.title: Horse Race Encounter #1
items.description: Interaction: Here you may be challenged to a horse race. Note, there are 3 possible Horse Race Encounters

items.title: Murfree Brood Prisoner
items.description: Interaction: You might find a man hanging from a tree. Shoot him down and loot the body to find the _Murfree Brood Prisoner's Note_. Note: This event may appear in other locations across the area

items.title: Murfree Brood Prisoner
items.description: Interaction: You might find a man hanging from a tree. Shoot him down and loot the body to find the _Murfree Brood Prisoner's Note_. Note: This event may appear in other locations across the area

items.title: Mexican Gunslinger Challenge (III)
items.description: Interaction: A Mexican man will once again challenge you to shoot bottles and birds.

items.title: Grand Theft Horse (II)
items.description: Interaction: A Mexican stranger will ask you for help because he has lost his horse. If you offer to help him, he may attempt to steal your horse - so be wary!

items.title: Ku Klux Klan - Cross Raising
items.description: Interaction: At any time of day might find 3 Klan members attempting to erect a cross in preparation for a rally. If you shoot one of the men with the white hats, the cross will fall on top of the other. You can gain honor by killing them.

items.title: Fake Doctor
items.description: Availability: Epilogue 1 onward Interaction: You will meet a man who is looking for a charlatan who sold him a cure for impotence, which turned out to be ordinary water with flour and sugar. You can find the charlatan in a toilet on the other side of town.

items.title: Poisoned Stranger
items.description: Interaction: A man is vomiting after eating something poisonous and asks for medicine. You gain honor if you save him. You can find the herb he ate nearby.

items.title: Woeful Lover (II)
items.description: Requirements: There are 2 stages to experience. The second stage is unlocked from Epilogue 1 onward. Interaction: Here you may meet a young man skimming stones across the river. You can give him relationship advice to cheer him up.

items.title: Mexican Gunslinger Challenge (V)
items.description: Interaction: A Mexican man will once again challenge you to shoot bottles and birds.

items.title: Skinner Ambush
items.description: Availability: Epilogue Interaction: When passing through the area, one of the Skinners throws a corpse from a stone ledge and you are surrounded by 6 Skinners.

items.title: Murfree Brood Pit Trap
items.description: Interaction: A stranger asks for help - if you approach you'll get caught in a trap and be assaulted by members of the Murfree Brood.

items.title: Grand Theft Horse (III)
items.description: Interaction: A Mexican stranger will ask you for help because he has lost his horse. If you offer to help him, he may attempt to steal your horse - so be wary!

items.title: A Woman Undressing
items.description: Availability: (?) Interaction: At night, two men can be found peeking through a window. If you peek inside you will see a woman in her bedroom getting undressed. You can chase the men away to gain Honor, but you will lose Honor for peeking yourself - and continue to lose even more Honor if you stay and watch.

items.title: Safe-Breakers
items.description: Interaction: Here you may come across two men trying to open a safe with dynamite.

items.title: Moonshiners (II)
items.description:
A few days after finding the moonshiners' first camp, you can find them again working on their second recipe. They want you to bring them some local berries. Add some berries (2x raspberries) to their still and receive $27.50 x2 in return for your efforts.

You can also find them in these locations:

- Moonshiners (I)
- Moonshiners (III)
- Moonshiners (IV)

items.title: Moonshiners (I)
items.description:
A pair of moonshiners will try to chase you away, but if you approach, they'll ask for help instead. Give them two Indian Tobacco plants, and they'll reward you with Aged Pirate Rum.

You can also find them in these locations:
- Moonshiners (II)
- Moonshiners (III)
- Moonshiners (IV)

items.title: Ku Klux Klan Meeting
items.description:
Here you can stumble across a comedic KKK meeting.

At night if you get close enough, they might attack you. Killing and looting the dark robed Klansman gives you a "Meeting Notes" letter.

This is one of the random locations.

items.title: Snakebite Victim
items.description: Interaction: A stranger will run out of the woods asking for help with a snakebite. Give him a health cure or suck out the venom to save him and gain honor.

items.title: Nite Folk Victim (III)
items.description:
Come here at night, and find a man hung from a tree at the side of the road. After approaching the body, you'll be attacked by 3 "Night Folk".

After killing them, shoot down the body and loot it to find the "Nite Folk's Victim's Note".

In next time you find the second "Nite Folk's Victim's Note" in which it will be written about the bet.

items.title: Drunk stranger (I)
items.description: A drunk stranger will sit by the fire and invite you to sit by the fire together. When you sit down next to him, he will ask you for whiskey and begin his story about Fort Riggs and the Indians. After the stranger finishes his story, he will fall asleep, and if you loot him, you will find a decorated Indian ring.

items.title: Grand Theft Horse (IV)
items.description: Alternative location for Grand Theft Horse random event

items.title: Moonshiners (III)
items.description:
This is the third location you can find the Moonshiners at night. They want Ginseng this time. Add 2x Ginseng to the still, and collect your reward of $27.50, moonshine, and Honor.

You can also find them in these locations:

- Moonshiners (I)
- Moonshiners (II)
- Moonshiners (IV)

items.title: Murfree Brood Torture
items.description: Interaction: Here you may come across 2 Murfrees torturing a man tied to a tree. Free him for honor.

items.title: Marital Dispute
items.description: Interaction: Here you may come across a husband attempting to drown his wife. Help the woman to receive honor.

items.title: Wolf Attack
items.description: You may find a man being mauled by a wolf here. Killing the wolf gives you the option to share a whiskey or health cure with the man to gain some Honor, but he'll die from blood loss either way.

items.title: Blind Beggar
items.description:
There's a blind beggar asking for money. Giving him 50 cents will reward you with some Honor.

Eventually, the beggar will get up and walk away with a hearty laugh - he was only pretending to be blind. You can point your gun at him to force a confession.

items.title: Police Chase
items.description: While walking through this street you can come across a police officer chasing a thief. Follow them to watch the thief get knocked out and carried away.

items.title: Mutilated Horse & Nite Folk Ambush
items.description: A cart holding a mutilated horse can be found here. Proceeding past it into the swamp (or chasing your horse if it's spooked by the sight) will lead to an ambush from a small group of Nite Folk. Tip: Don't let your horse go too far - the Nite Folk may kill it.

items.title: Moonshiners (IV)
items.description:
Another place where you can find the Moonshiners. If it's the fourth place you've found them, they'll ask for Oleander Sage - handing it over will lead to one of the men dying, and the other attacking.

You can also find them in these locations:
- Moonshiners (I)
- Moonshiners (II)
- Moonshiners (III)

items.title: Miner's Spouse
items.description: You can find a miner arguing with his wife here. Both can be spoken to afterwards for additional dialogue.

items.title: Dead Rider
items.description: A man on horseback will soon fall down dead as you approach. Loot him for a reasonably high chance to be find a gold nugget or four gold teeth.

items.title: Nite Folk: Crying Woman
items.description:
Try wandering the area at night, and you might hear a crying woman.  If you approach her, she'll attack and run away. Shoot her from afar for a closer look at her mottled gray skin and white eyes, or chase her to be attacked by a group of Nite Folk.

Rest assured, it gets creepier. If you camp near the area and sleep until midnight, then activate focus, you'll find the tracks of a "Stranger" leading away from where you were sleeping... right to the "crying" woman.

items.description: An alternate location for the Moonshiners.

items.title: Rat Infestation
items.description:
During the day you may encounter a bartender arguing with a Chinese worker due to a rat infestation. Speaking to the bartender and agreeing to getting rid of the infestation of 8-10 rats in the saloon will reward you with money and honour.

_Tip: Use a varmint rifle or small game arrows for clean kills - they will count as Perfect Rat Carcasses for Hunting Request #2._

items.title: O'Driscoll Train Heist
items.description:
O'Driscolls are robbing a train with their victims lined up. 

You'll gain honor for intervening, and lose honor if you watch the victims get killed.

items.title: Fundraiser
items.description: You can donate $20 to support the Homeless Veteran Shelter (or you can loot the lock box). Quest Giver: Unknown Woman Requirements: Chapters 2-6 Reward: Honor *You can also return to this location in the Epilogue to find Arthur's name on the plaque if you donated.*

items.title: All That Glitters - Jack Hall Gang Treasure Hunt
items.description: Quest Giver: Máximo Cristóbal Valdespino Region: South-West of Horseshoe Overlook Camp Requirements: None Reward: 2 Gold Bars (each worth $500) Purchase the map from Maximo for $10, reject his offer to haggle it down to $5, or steal it. If you miss the opportunity, it can be purchased from a Fence later. Once the map is collected, the Jack Hall Gang Treasure Hunt begins - and continues here.

items.title: The Noblest of Men, and a Woman
items.description: Quest Giver: Jim Boy Calloway / Theodore Levin Region: Valentine Requirements Parts I & II: Chapter 2 onward Parts III & IV: Completing *A Fine Night of Debauchery* (Chapter 4)

items.description: Quest Giver: Deborah MacGuiness Region: New Hanover, The Heartlands Requirements: Chapter 2 Reward: Skull Statue & Jaw Bone Knife, Completes "Dinosaur Bones" in 100% progress checklist (2%) Deborah MacGuiness will ask you to collect 30 Dinosaur Bones

items.description: Quest Giver: Algernon Wasp Region: Garden house north of Saint Denis Requirements: Chapter 4 after finishing *The Gilded Cage* Reward: $760, hat, revolver Note: The quest must be completed to finish Herbalist Challenge 9; otherwise all the required orchids will not spawn. Exotic Request #1: 5 x Snowy Egret Plumes 5 x Little Egret Plumes 5 x Reddish Egret Plumes 15 x Lady of the Night Orchids Exotic Request #2: 20 x Heron Plumes 7 x Lady Slipper Orchids 10 x Moccasin Flower Orchids Exotic Request #3: 25 x Gator Eggs 3 x Acuna's Star Orchids 7 x Cigar Orchids 5 x Ghost Orchids Exotic Request #4: 30 x Spoonbill Plumes 5 x Night Scented Orchids 10 x Rat Tail Orchids 5 x Spider Orchids Exotic Request #5: 5 x Clamshell Orchids 5 x Dragon's Mouth Orchids 5 x Queen's Orchids 10 x Sparrow's Egg Orchids

They can be found as grey dot encounters to the north of Saint Denis.

items.description: This is your campsite between "The Wheel" and "The Landowning Classes" in Epilogue, Part I. NB: Pronghorn Ranch will only exist after completing Chapter 6.

items.title: Snowfield Shack Cheat Code
items.description: Etched into a drawer in the shack is the cheat code "You flourish before you die". This cheat increases your Health, Stamina, and Dead Eye bars to be full. *Cheat codes are activated in the Settings menu. They are not CasE SenSitiVe, but punctuation must be copied exactly as it appears in the quotation marks above.*

items.title: Deer Cottage Cheat Code
items.description: The cheat code "You want more than you have" is etched into the top drawer of a dresser in the Deer Cottage. This cheat spawns a superior horse in front of you. *Cheat codes are activated in the Settings menu. They are not CasE SenSitiVe, but punctuation must be copied exactly as it appears in the quotation marks above.*

items.title: Ambarino Sign Cheat Code
items.description: On the wooden train track supports you'll see the cheat code "Make Me Better" etched into a plank forming the large 'R'. This cheat increases your Dead Eye proficiency to level 2. Activating Dead Eye level 2 will allow you to manually mark targets with Dead Eye. *Cheat codes are activated in the Settings menu. They are not CasE SenSitiVe, but punctuation must be copied exactly as it appears in the quotation marks above.*

items.title: Red Wagon Cheat Code
items.description: The cheat code "You want everyone to go away" is etched into the wagon. This cheat removes any bounties you have accrued and ends any lockdowns you have triggered. *Cheat codes are activated in the Settings menu. They are not CasE SenSitiVe, but punctuation must be copied exactly as it appears in the quotation marks above.*

items.title: Vetter's Echo Cheat Code
items.description: Take the Black Widow Spider cigarette card and search the desk drawers beneath it to find "You Want Punishment" carved into the top drawer. This cheat increases your wanted level. *Cheat codes are activated in the Settings menu. They are not CasE SenSitiVe, but punctuation must be copied exactly as it appears in the quotation marks above.*

items.title: Cairn Lake Cheat Code
items.description: The cheat code "Keep your dreams simple" is carved into the ice. This cheat spawns a wagon in front of you. *Cheat codes are activated in the Settings menu. They are not CasE SenSitiVe, but punctuation must be copied exactly as it appears in the quotation marks above.*

items.title: Two Crows Cheat Code
items.description: The cheat code "The best of the old ways" is carved into the wood inside the shack. This cheat spawns a stagecoach in front of you. *Cheat codes are activated in the Settings menu. They are not CasE SenSitiVe, but punctuation must be copied exactly as it appears in the quotation marks above.*

items.title: Dilapidated House Cheat Code
items.description: Go inside the shack to find the code "You want something new". This cheat spawns a random horse in front of you. *Cheat codes are activated in the Settings menu. They are not CasE SenSitiVe, but punctuation must be copied exactly as it appears in the quotation marks above.*

items.title: Fort Riggs Cheat Code
items.description: Inside the building you will find "RUN! RUN! RUN!" written on the chalkboard. This cheat spawns a race horse in front of you. *Cheat codes are activated in the Settings menu. They are not CasE SenSitiVe, but punctuation must be copied exactly as it appears in the quotation marks above.*

items.title: Lannahechee Shipwreck Cheat Code

This cheat increases your whistle range, allowing your horse to find you no matter how far away you are. *Cheat codes are activated in the Settings menu. They are not CasE SenSitiVe, but punctuation must be copied exactly as it appears in the quotation marks above.*

They are not CasE SenSitiVe, but punctuation must be copied exactly as it appears in the quotation marks above.*

items.title: Rio Bravo Island Cheat Code

They are not CasE SenSitiVe, but punctuation must be copied exactly as it appears in the quotation marks above.*

items.title: Houseboat Cheat Code
items.description: Climb over to the end of the little boathouse and find the code "Seek all the bounty of this place" This cheat increases your Health, Stamina, and Dead Eye bar levels. *Cheat codes are activated in the Settings menu. They are not CasE SenSitiVe, but punctuation must be copied exactly as it appears in the quotation marks above.*

Activating Dead Eye level 5 will highlight critical areas in addition to fatal areas while in Dead Eye. *Cheat codes are activated in the Settings menu. They are not CasE SenSitiVe, but punctuation must be copied exactly as it appears in the quotation marks above.*

items.title: Owanjila Cheat Code
items.description: Under the Owanjila Dam is the cheat code "I still seek more". This cheat increases your Dead Eye proficiency to level 4. Activating Dead Eye level 4 will highlight fatal areas while in Dead Eye. *Cheat codes are activated in the Settings menu. They are not CasE SenSitiVe, but punctuation must be copied exactly as it appears in the quotation marks above.*

items.title: Clemens Cove Shipwreck Cheat Code
items.description: On the front of the shipwreck you can find the cheat code "I shall be better". This cheat increases your Dead Eye proficiency to level 3. Activating Dead Eye level 3 will allow you to remain in Dead Eye after firing your weapon. *Cheat codes are activated in the Settings menu. They are not CasE SenSitiVe, but punctuation must be copied exactly as it appears in the quotation marks above.*

items.title: Sunken Boat Cheat Code

They are not CasE SenSitiVe, but punctuation must be copied exactly as it appears in the quotation marks above.*

items.title: Lookout Tower Cheat Code

This cheat resets your Honor to absolute neutrality. *Cheat codes are activated in the Settings menu. They are not CasE SenSitiVe, but punctuation must be copied exactly as it appears in the quotation marks above.*

This cheat decreases your Honor level to its lowest possible value. *Cheat codes are activated in the Settings menu. They are not CasE SenSitiVe, but punctuation must be copied exactly as it appears in the quotation marks above.*

items.description: Inside this small cave is the cheat code "Greed is now a virtue". This cheat gives you $500 every time it is activated. *Cheat codes are activated in the Settings menu. They are not CasE SenSitiVe, but punctuation must be copied exactly as it appears in the quotation marks above.*

They are not CasE SenSitiVe, but punctuation must be copied exactly as it appears in the quotation marks above.*

items.title: UFO
items.description: Inspect the Mysterious Sermon found inside the shack.  You'll then need to return at 2am and look up through the roof to see the UFO. It will disappear when you step outside.

items.title: Massive Dead Snake
items.description: A large snake can be found dead in the branches of a tree here.

items.title: Witch's Cauldron
items.description: A cauldron with an unknown liquid the player can drink. Drinking it will result in the player blacking out and waking up several yards away with all their cores being restored to maximum.

items.title: Robot
items.description: Requirements: Complete chapter 4 mission "Joys of Civilization", Complete Marko Dragic stranger missions If you're using the Electric Lantern, it will glow red/orange as you get closer to the robot

items.title: Conversation with a Giant - Starting Point
items.description: Requirements: Study at least 30 animals When you arrive at the location on a clear day (not rainy, stormy, snowy or foggy), a flock of birds will take off from the shore. Follow them until you reach an inaccessible cave. A conversation with a kind-hearted giant will automatically start. You can have a second conversation if you return 3 days later, and two more in the Epilogue.

items.title: Ghost Train
items.description: Spawns on this stretch of tracks, generally in the middle of the night or around 3AM.

items.title: Vampire
items.description: Requirements: Find the 5 vampire clues: #1, #2, #3, #4, #5 After finding the 5 clues, you'll find a vampire here finishing off his latest victim. If you kill him, you'll receive an Ornate Dagger Note: You have to come at night, and he may not always spawn. Appears between 00:00 and 01:00. Tip: If you kill him and are unable to find the dagger then it will be available at the Fence.

items.title: Conversation with a Giant - Cave
items.description: Requirements: Study at least 30 animals After following this flock of birds, this is the cave where the Giant can be encountered (but not seen). You can have a second conversation if you return 3 days later, and two more in the Epilogue.

items.title: Mexico Glitch
items.description: Requirements: Max horse stamina, stamina + health stimulants & revivers. Note: Save before attempting this glitch. First, you need to cross the river at the narrowest point, opposite this marker. Your horse will need stamina + health stimulants to stay alive during this. Then, head for this marked location. You need to run your horse into the end of the canyon, and attempt to glitch yourself up to the top ledge (you can use cheats if your horse dies - but make sure you save before doing this). Eventually you'll be able to glitch yourself up on top of the canyon and explore all of Mexico.

items.title: Glowing Pentagram
items.description: A red glowing pentagram appears below a small shack here between 4am and 5am

items.title: Sheep Lover
items.description: You'll find a Gold Wedding Ring tied to his "wife"

items.title: Josiah Trelawny's House
items.description: Head up the stairs here to listen to a conversation inside the Trelawny home. If you wait around for long enough, Arthur will call out to him and have a brief chat.

items.title: Missing Princess Poster
items.description: On the outside wall of the saloon. A poster offering a reward for the missing _Princess Isabeau Katharina Zinsmeister_

items.title: Manzanita Post Mystery
items.description: This area is home to a small group of Norwegian immigrants. You can find 3 items for this mystery: - Norwegian Journal Page - inside the chimney of the small cabin. - Norwegian Photo - found under a loose floorboard. - Norwegian Newspaper Scrap - looted from the husband. By translating these items you can uncover a dark secret about the people here.

items.title: Alchemist's House
items.description: When you approach this house for the first time, you'll witness the alchemist's final experiment!

items.title: The Whispering Forest
items.description:
Walk through the forest during a fog, and you'll hear 2 voices whispering.

If you go to a theatre and watch "The Ghastly Serenade", you can learn the story of these voices

items.title: Frozen Cattle Drive
items.description: A herd of cattle frozen in the snow from a failed drive.

items.title: Well
items.description: At the bottom of the well in front of the repossessed house, there's 4 quarters, and a number of carved tally marks and crosses in the wall, suggesting someone was kept down there against their will.

items.title: Strange Man Portrait
items.description: There is a portrait of the Strange Man behind Herbert Moon in the General Store.

items.title: UFO #2
items.description: After finding the mysterious sermon and seeing the first UFO at Hani's Bethel, come to the peak of Mount Shann and wait until around midnight / 1AM / 2AM for a second glimpse at life beyond the stars.

items.title: Rock Painting #1
items.description: Note: Unrelated to the rock carving collectibles.

items.title: Rock Painting #2
items.description: On the side of a boulder. Note: Unrelated to the rock carving collectibles.

items.title: Rock Painting #3
items.description: Note: Unrelated to the rock carving collectibles.

items.title: Rock Painting #4
items.description: Note: Unrelated to the rock carving collectibles.

items.title: Leader X Tree
items.description: A tree with strange markings that can only be spotted from a distance.

items.title: Severed Arm
items.description:
You can catch a severed arm while fishing near the mayor's house.

*Note: Will only appear if you opted to kill Jean-Marc at the end of Idealism and Pragmatism for Beginners III*

items.title: Pagan Symbols on a Tree (1/3)
items.description: Carved into a tree north-west of the Tiny Church.

items.title: Pagan Ritual Painting
items.description: Enter the Devil's Cave, cross the bridge and follow the tunnel to the right. The painting is on the left wall just before reaching the room with the ladder.

items.title: New Hanover Rock Arrangement
items.description: Just off the path you'll see "New Hanover" spelled out with rocks on the side of the hill.

items.title: Rains Fall
items.description: *Epilogue Only* Rains Fall can be encountered in the train station here during the epilogue.

items.title: Meteor Shower
items.description: At around 2:30 - 3 AM, in the field near the Meteor House - you can see a meteor shower if the sky is clear. The spot is easiest to reach when approaching from the south-west.

items.title: Joshua Burgess
items.description:
While not a member of the Dutch Van Der Linde gang this gravestone represents an interesting story that is told through a letter found elsewhere on the map, in a wrecked mail truck.

The gravestone reads "Joshua Burgess Accidentally shot August 1898". The shooting occurred less than a year before the beginning of the story. The story in the letter tells of a relationship between the daughter of the man who owns Emerald Ranch and a young man. 

The ranch owner did not approve of the relationship and shot the young man in the saloon which still has blood on the floor and bullet holes in the walls where the shooting occurred.

items.title: Miriam Wegner
items.description: Miriam can be seen looking out of the upstairs window around midnight and noon.

items.title: Workers' Gravestone
items.description: A single wooden headstone inscribed with the "names" of workers who died while building the railroad can be found here. Small piles of clothing can be found in front of it.

items.title: El Presidio
items.description:
Look across the river to spot this iconic fort that served as a stronghold for the Mexican army in the first Red Dead Redemption.

Cannot be reached without the use of the Mexico Glitch.

items.title: Precarious Wagon
items.description: A wagon teeters on the edge of a cliff. If you climb inside, you will immediately slip forward and fall to your death. As if that wasn't enough, the game dramatically zooms in as it happens.

items.title: "Why" Trees
items.description: Several burned and shattered trees, presumably hit by lightning, can be found here. If you stand at a specific angle, they spell the word "WHY".

items.title: Pagan Grave
items.description: A pagan grave with a skull tombstone

items.title: Pagan Symbols on a Tree 3/3
items.description: Directly east of the Tiny Church, near an Acuna's Star Orchid.

items.title: Hanging Man & Hearse
items.description: A hearse was seemingly attacked here, with the coffin it was carrying laying open. The driver, or perhaps the corpse he was transporting, is hanging from the vehicle.

items.title: Legendary Channel Catfish
items.description: Note: The Legendary Channel Catfish is not obtainable and was only mentioned when Jeremy Gill tried to catch it during _"A Fisher of Fish II"_. _After you complete the mission, The Legendary Channel Catfish becomes visible on the map like any other legendary fish, but still cannot be caught._

items.title: Bayonet in Tree
items.description: 50 paces from the Southeast corner of the old Bolger Glade Church - a rifle / bayonet is stuck in the tree

items.title: Ghosts of Bolger Glade
items.description: Come here during a stormy night to hear ghostly whispers from General Harris & his men during the Battle of Scarlett Meadows of 1864.

items.title: Pan Tree
items.description: A bunch of pots and pans are stuck to this tree.

items.title: Tilly Jackson
items.description: *Epilogue Only* Tilly can be encountered in the park here during the epilogue.

items.title: Greta Van Der Linde
items.description: The final resting place of Dutch's mother can be found here, towards the right side of the middle row.

items.title: Chain Gang
items.description: A group of skeletons in prisoner clothing can be found in the woods here. It seems one of them removed his foot to escape the chains, but he couldn't escape the reaper.

items.title: Cave Painting
items.description: Inside Elysian Cave

items.title: Shiver Me Timbers
items.description: Underneath the bridge, a peg-legged pirate corpse can be found with an unburied chest. You can also find a long-dead dead alligator next to him, and loot the chest for Bitters & Money

items.title: A Cowboy of No Name
items.description:
Grave marker for a "Cowboy of No Name" - referencing the "Man With No Name" from _The Good, the Bad and the Ugly_.

The same grave can also be found in the first game.

The story of the fort is told by a drunk army veteran during a random stranger encounter. A letter can be found in the main building that appears to be practice for the correct spelling of various english words. If you write down the first letter of each word a secret poem is revealed. Approach landmarks to have them added to your map.

items.title: Serial Killer Clue - #2
items.description: Murder Scene: A dismembered body is tied to a rock. On a nearby rock you'll find a head with "Killer Clue 2 Piece" in its mouth. Mission Unlocked: Finding all 3 clues unlocks the *American Dreams* stranger mission.

items.title: Serial Killer Clue - #1
items.description: Murder Scene: A dismembered body is strung up under a bridge. On a stake nearby you'll find a head that has "Killer Clue 1 Piece" in its mouth. You can also shoot the body down. Mission Unlocked: Finding all 3 clues unlocks the American Dreams stranger mission.

items.title: Serial Killer Clue - #3
items.description: Murder Scene: This body is tied to a large tree. At the base of the tree, you'll find a head on a stake, with "Serial Killer 3 Piece" in its mouth. Mission Unlocked: Finding all 3 clues unlocks the *American Dreams* stranger mission.

items.title: Deformed Singing Man
items.description: On the porch, playing a banjo

items.title: Vampire Clue - #1
items.description: The clue is at ground level, on the wall on the corner of the building. You'll see white writing which you need to examine to begin the investigation.

items.title: Vampire Clue - #2
items.description: Just before you enter the market, look to the right of the arch, and you'll see an area with some railings and a metal gate.  The clue is here, on the wall on the left (beside some barrels).

items.title: Vampire Clue - #3
items.description: Between the General Store and the Butcher's. The writing is on the wall facing the train tracks to the south.

items.title: Vampire Clue - #4
items.description: From the garden with a tree in the middle, go through the archway that's furthest to the right. There, you'll find the writing above a chair, on the corner.

items.title: Vampire Clue - #5
items.description: On a wall under the arches.  This clue is slightly difficult to spot, due to the shadows.

items.title: Panoramic Map POV
items.description: This is the exact spot depicted in the Panoramic Map. There's also a sundial nearby.

items.title: Cougar's Den
items.description: Not a reliable place to find cougars, oddly enough.

items.title: Shallow Grave
items.description: You may find yourself here after a few drinks at Aberdeen Pig Farm. Bring the woman that lives at the pig farm here to get some extra dialogue.

items.title: Micah's Camp
items.description: Availability: After completing _An American Pastoral Scene_. Here you will find some old newspaper clippings and documents that Micah has stashed.

items.title: Liability Agreement
items.description: Found on a table in Butcher’s Creek, but only after The Wisdom of the Elders V
